title: Senior Account Executive – AV Solutions
description:
Employment Type: Full-Time

Are you a driven sales professional with an interest in Audio & Video (AV) technology? AV Media Pte Ltd is looking for a Senior Account Executive to grow our business, manage key accounts, and build long-term client relationships. Candidates with the right attitude and potential will be supported with training and growth opportunities.

About Us

AV Media Pte Ltd is a leading provider of Audio & Video solutions in Singapore. We specialise in:

  • LED display solutions

  • Interactive panels

  • Professional audio systems

  • Smart classroom and collaboration solutions

We serve schools, corporate clients, and government sectors with customised, reliable AV solutions.

Key Responsibilities

  • Promote and sell AV solutions including LED displays, interactive panels, and professional audio systems

  • Manage and grow relationships with existing and new customers

  • Conduct product presentations and basic system demonstrations

  • Prepare quotations, follow up with clients, and close sales

  • Coordinate with internal teams to ensure smooth project execution

  • Support sales and marketing activities when required

Requirements

  • Preferably 1 year or more of experience in sales (AV, electronics, or IT-related products preferred)

  • Basic understanding or strong interest in AV and IT technology

  • Good communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills

  • Self-motivated, responsible, and target-oriented

  • Possess a valid driving licence and own vehicle

  • Entry-level candidates with strong potential are welcome; training will be provided

Why Join Us

  • Competitive salary with attractive commission structure

  • Exposure to industry-leading AV solutions

  • Clear career progression to Account Manager and Sales Manager roles

  • Supportive and collaborative work environment


How to Apply

Interested candidates may email their resume to avm@avmedia.com.sg
Please indicate “Senior Account Executive – AV Solutions” in the email subject.

We look forward to welcoming you to our team.

postedCompany.description:
Established in 1992, AV MEDIA PTE LTD is based with a registered office in Bukit Batok, Singapore. The core business and focal point of AV MEDIA is the provision of IT and  Audio Visual Equipments. AV MEDIA proficient audio visual services range from providing Superior Professional Equipment and Audio Visual System Design to Skilled Production and Technical Support.


AV Media Mission Statement
We Ensure That Customers’ Needs Are Met With Maximum Satisfaction.

AV MEDIA always provide our customers with total solutions at a competitive price, within agreed time-scales and to exceed our worldwide customers’ expectation in everything we do.

AV MEDIA certainly hope that our existing products will be able to add values to your existing operations and products lines.


AV Media and Strategic Partners
AV MEDIA strikes strategic alliances with renowned manufacturers like LUMENS, SANHA, REACH and PANASONIC in the AV industry.
